page: Microsoft Azure M128-64bds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 32 physical cores and 64 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The server is equipped with an exceptionally large memory capacity of 2794.0 GB, providing 43.66 GB of RAM per core. Additionally, it includes 6144 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not include any GPU accelerators.

Benchmark data highlights the server's strong multi-core capabilities and top-tier memory performance. The Intel Xeon processor achieves a top-tier Geekbench single-core score of 2203.0 and a strong multi-core score of 20113.0. Memory bandwidth is a major strength, with top-tier read-only large block speeds of 367.66 GB/sec and write speeds of 169.25 GB/sec. Database performance is also notable, registering a top-tier Passmark database operations score of 35100.58 and a strong Redis SET throughput of 87.35 million operations per second.

Given its massive memory-to-CPU ratio and high-capacity local storage, the M128-64bds_3_v3 offers high resource density for memory-bound enterprise applications. While the lack of GPU hardware limits its suitability for heavy deep learning training, its strong CPU-based LLM inference capabilities and massive RAM make it highly cost-efficient for large-scale in-memory databases, complex data analytics, enterprise relational databases, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure M128-64bds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor, it delivers 64 vCPUs across 32 physical cores at 4.0 GHz, paired with a massive 2794.0 GB of RAM and 6144 GB of local storage. The server exhibits top-tier memory performance, with large-block read bandwidth reaching 367.66 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 169.25 GB/sec. It also demonstrates strong multi-core capabilities, scoring 20113.0 in Geekbench multi-core and achieving 87.35 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks. Lacking a GPU, this instance is optimized for memory-bound and storage-heavy applications rather than parallel graphics processing. It is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, data analytics, and high-throughput enterprise applications requiring significant memory density and fast local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128-64bds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 vCPUs, 2794 GB RAM, and 6144 GB local storage, delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring massive RAM capacity and fast local storage for demanding enterprise database workloads.

Massive 2794.0 GB of RAM providing 43.66 GB of memory per core.
6144 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.
